message:
fix(writing): hero stat chip — \$500/mo→\$500K to match tier taxonomy

The hero stat chip labeled "Works at \$500/mo or \$500M" mixed units:
monthly rate vs stock of net worth. TierTriageViz frames the wealth
spectrum in net-worth bands ("< \$500K", "\$500K–\$3M", "\$100M+"),
and the showcase section explicitly says the skill scales "from a
twenty-six-year-old renter with a first 401(k) through to a
hundred-million-dollar industrialist". Aligned the chip to net worth:
"Works at \$500K or \$500M" keeps the small/large rhetorical pairing
with parallel units.

bun tsc --noEmit clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
